hero.title: Hello, I am Mariano Hilario
hero.subtitle: Fullstack developer and operational leader based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
hero.text: Fullstack developer focused on creating efficient and scalable web solutions, combining technical and operational experience.
hero.sub-text: +20 years in operational leadership | +{devYears} years developing web applications

about.subtitle: Career Summary
about.text: With over 20 years of experience leading teams and optimizing processes, today I develop web applications focused on solving real-world problems efficiently and scalably.
about.fourth-job-title: Head of Management Control and Processes at

skills.subtitle: Experience in multiple projects and technologies
skills.frontend-text: I develop web interfaces using React, Next.js, and TypeScript, focused on performance, usability, and user experience.
skills.backend-text: I build APIs and services with Node.js and NestJS, managing business logic, authentication, and efficient data handling.
skills.testing-text: I apply testing with Jest and best practices to ensure maintainable, reliable, and easily scalable code.
skills.devops-text: I work with Git, GitHub/GitLab, and Docker to maintain organized development workflows and consistent deployments.
skills.soft-text: Over 20 years leading teams and optimizing processes, bringing strategic vision and a results-oriented focus to software development.

projects.title: Projects
projects.project1-desc:
Booking application for a beauty salon, focused on a refined user experience. It features an editorial design inspired by luxury brands: Italian serif typography (Cormorant Garamond), glassmorphism effects, a cohesive pink palette, and subtle animations.
Stack: React, Redux Toolkit, Node.js, TypeScript, Express, TypeORM, and PostgreSQL. Includes authentication, appointment management with an interactive calendar, dynamic service catalog, and contact form. Deployed on Vercel + Render.
projects.project2-desc: Project created for showcasing movies and watching their trailers.
projects.project3-desc: Project developed for the promotion and sale of custom toys.
projects.project4-desc:
Corporate website for MVA SRL, presenting information about the company's services, history, contact section, and client portal.
Stack: Next.js, Nest.js, TypeORM, PostgreSQL, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
projects.project5-desc:
CRM developed for lawyers to efficiently manage clients, cases, tasks, hearings, deadlines, and each client's account status.
Stack: Next.js, Nest.js, TypeORM, PostgreSQL, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
projects.project8-desc: Create your notes and drag and drop them anywhere on the screen.
